case_title: EMILY YEE VS. CYNTHIA DEMESA et al

docket_entries.description: HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT ANITA DE LA CRUZ WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. ATTY. DROHAN APPEARED FOR APPLICANT AND WITHDRAWS THE APPLICATION. THE COURT FINDS THAT THE APPLICANT'S INCOME IS ENOUGH TO PAY THE COMMON NECESSARIES OF LIFE AND COURT FEES AND COSTS. ANITA DE LA CRUZ HAS TEN DAYS TO PAY THE FILING FEES OR THE FILINGS WILL BE STRICKEN. ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF FEE SENT TO ALL PARTIES. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; REPORTER: JOE VICKSTEIN, CSR #4780 (206)
